notes:
RESEARCH (sourced, adversarial) for XY BREAKthrough (xy8), an XY-era set.

ERA ANCHORS (Flipside Gaming "Comprehensive Review of Rarity Part Two", fetched OK; corroborated by Card Chill pull-rate article, found in search but blocked HTTP 429 on direct fetch): XY-era per-pack rates settled around Pokemon-EX ~1:6, Ultra Rare / Full Art / Mega-EX ~1:12, Pokemon BREAK ~1:12, Secret Rare ~1:72 (1 per ~2 boxes; constant across the era). These are era figures, not a per-set BREAKthrough opening study.

COMMUNITY SAMPLE (pokemonwizard.com BREAKthrough page, surfaced + summarized in web search): a single 32-pack box reported 5 holos, 7 EXs, 3 BREAKs, 7 reverse-holo rares. That gives, for the hit slot, ultra-rare-bucket (EX+BREAK) = 10/32 = 0.3125/pack and rare-holo = 5/32 = 0.156/pack. Treated as a single small box (n=1), so it caps confidence, but it cross-checks the era anchors and the per-box economy.

BUCKET MAPPING — CRITICAL: this set's available buckets are {common, uncommon, rare, rare-holo, ultra-rare, secret-rare, null} with NO separate "ex" bucket. So ALL of Pokemon-EX, Mega-EX, Pokemon BREAK, and Full-Art Trainers collapse into ultra-rare (the given count ultra-rare=24 reflects exactly that: ~6 EX printings + M-EX + 5 BREAK + full-art trainers). secret-rare=2 = the two secret Mewtwo-EX full arts (163/162, 164/162) -> ~1 per 2 boxes. The "null" bucket (1 card) is an unclassified/promo-style entry, not a pulled slot, so it is excluded from the distribution.

DISTRIBUTION (single rare-or-better hit slot, per-pack, sums to 1.0 exactly):
  ultra-rare = 0.27 (EX+M-EX+BREAK+FA-trainer combined; held slightly under the 0.3125 video-box sample since opening videos over-represent hits; consistent with EX 1:6 ~0.19 of EX-family + BREAK ~1:12 ~0.083)
  rare-holo  = 0.15 (community 5/32=0.156; rounded)
  secret-rare= 0.0139 (1:72 era constant)
  rare       = 0.5661 (remainder/non-holo rare fill)
  SUM = 1.000000 (verified by script).
PER-BOX SANITY (x36): 9.72 ultra-rare/box (matches the sample's ~10 EX+BREAK and the "guaranteed handful of EX + Mega + BREAK per box" reports), 5.4 rare-holo/box, 0.5 secret/box (1 per 2 boxes), 20.4 non-holo rares/box. Total = 36 hits = 36 packs. Hit economy sane, not over-claimed.

FILLER SLOTS (XY-era baseline, confirmed era structure): 4 common (common=1.0), 3 uncommon (uncommon=1.0), 1 reverse-holo modeled 50/50 common/uncommon filler (sums to 1.0). 10th card = basic Energy (XY8 packs are 10 cards including an Energy per the Pokemon Center sleeved-booster listing), not modeled.

PRODUCTS: packSize=10 (Pokemon Center XY-BREAKthrough Sleeved Booster Pack "10 Cards"). displayPacks=36 (standard XY 36-pack booster box; eBay/Blowout/Magic Card Shop listings). etbPacks=8 (XY-BREAKthrough Elite Trainer Box includes 8 booster packs per ToyWiz + Pokemon Center listings). Vintage (2015) sealed-box collector premium means EV/booster will sit well below box price — expected, rates not inflated to compensate.

CONFIDENCE = low: special-card rates are XY-era figures (not a large per-set BREAKthrough study); the rare-holo vs non-holo split and ultra-rare blend rest on a single small community box opening plus era anchors. Honest cap.
